ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square miles */,
  "state_region" INTEGER /* Region to which the state belongs */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state (people per square mile) */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city of the state */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone(s) in which the state operates */,
  "date_of_admission" TEXT /* Date the state was admitted to the union */,
  "state_flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the state flag image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the demographic record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "illiteracy_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is illiterate */,
  "high_school_grad_rate" REAL /* Percentage of high school graduates in the state */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the state's population */,
  "gender_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of males to females */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ethnicities (JSON format) */,
  "population_pyramid_url" TEXT /* URL to the population pyramid chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "socioeconomic_data" (
  "socio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the socioeconomic record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "income" REAL /* Average income per capita in the state */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy of residents */,
  "murder_rate" REAL /* Murder rate per 100,000 residents */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the state */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the state */,
  "gini_coefficient" REAL /* Gini coefficient (measure of income inequality) */,
  "median_household_income" REAL /* Median household income in the state */,
  "health_insurance_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the population with health insurance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("socio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socioeconomic_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frost_data" (
  "frost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for frost record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "frost_days" INTEGER /* Number of frost days experienced in the state */,
  "last_frost_date" TEXT /* Last date of frost in the state for the current year */,
  "first_frost_date" TEXT /* First date of frost in the state for the current year */,
  "frost_free_period" INTEGER /* Number of days between the last and first frost dates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frost_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "area_statistics" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the area record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square miles */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Land area of the state in square miles */,
  "water_area" REAL /* Water area of the state in square miles */,
  "urban_area" REAL /* Urban area of the state in square miles */,
  "rural_area" REAL /* Rural area of the state in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_statistics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
